items.headline: Shares of financial services companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. The sector is also benefiting from easing energy prices and lower Treasury yields, which are helping to alleviate inflation concerns and support overall market sentiment.
10 Industrials Stocks With Whale Alerts In Today's Session

Shares of bank companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. The sector is also benefiting from easing energy prices and lower Treasury yields, which are helping to alleviate inflation concerns and support overall market sentiment.

Shares of airline companies are trading higher in response to President Trump's social media post indicating that the U.S will work closely with Iran and that many of the 15 points in the proposed plan to end the war have been agreed to. The industry may also be experiencing strength in response to Delta Air Lines' Q1 sales beat.
